summary: A Go-based test runner and schema validation framework with MCP integration and Goss migration capabilities.
concerns: High volume of agent-generated extra tests (0005-0025) suggests potential test flakiness or coverage gaps
Staged but uncommitted changes alongside active agent commits could cause merge conflicts
Deep coupling between runner execution and assertion types may hinder future extensibility
suggestions: Consolidate or prune redundant agent-generated extra tests to reduce maintenance burden
Commit or stash the staged changes to align with the active GOrchestra workflow
Review the deep_link assertion integration for edge cases in mobile project detection
